description: GA DCH: General operating rooms minimum 360 sq ft net clear floor area exclusive of fixed casework per FGI as adopted.
citation: Georgia Rules and Regulations for Hospitals Chapter 290-9-7

description: GA DCH: Single-bed patient room minimum 120 sq ft clear; semi-private room minimum 100 sq ft per patient.
GA DCH: ICU cubicle minimum 150 sq ft clear floor area; open-bay ICU minimum 120 sq ft per bed.
GA DCH: Emergency treatment rooms minimum 120 sq ft per treatment space.
GA DCH: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width per NFPA 101 as adopted by Georgia.
GA DCH: Surgical suites require 20 ACH total, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure, HEPA-filtered supply.
GA DCH: All new hospital construction and major renovation requires Georgia Certificate of Need approval. CON threshold currently $2.5M for new construction.
citation: Georgia Certificate of Need Law O.C.G.A. §31-6

description: GA DCH: Labor/delivery/recovery (LDR) room minimum 250 sq ft; LDRP minimum 300 sq ft.
